label: 第140話
source_locator: 単行本16巻 目次 p.129
summary_short: 乙骨は虎杖と脹相を引き離し、圧倒的な呪力量と剣技で虎杖を追い詰める。脹相は投射呪法を操る直哉と対峙する。
summary_full: 虎杖は乙骨から距離を取ろうとするが、乙骨の膨大な呪力量と呪力で強化された刀に追い詰められる。乙骨は自分の総呪力量が五条を上回る一方、五条は六眼によって呪力消費を限りなく抑えられると説明する。虎杖は自動車や建物を利用し、拾った刃物で抵抗する。別の場所では脹相が直哉の投射呪法へ対応しようとするが、一秒を24分割する動きに翻弄され、攻撃を受け続ける。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: Having located his target, 憂太 descends on the scene to cut in the middle of 悠仁 and 脹相 's scuffle with 直哉 . Seeing this as an opportunity, 直哉 turns 憂太 to his side and the two of them work together to separate 悠仁 from 脹相.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 憂太 approaches the group. As 憂太 unsheathes his katana, 悠仁 asks who he is and 脹相 seems to recognize his objective. 憂太 jumps from the balcony above and destroys a portion of the wall on his way down, leaving both 悠仁 and 脹相 dumbfounded. Slowing approaching them, he asks who is with 悠仁, and 脹相 says that 憂太 must be 悠仁's executioner. 直哉 raises both his hands and assures 憂太 that he is on his side, asking him if he is 乙骨. 悠仁 remembers the name as the second-year student mentioned by 恵 and that like 五条 , he is a Special Grade sorcerer . 直哉 introduces himself as 真希 's cousin and says that his objective is to kill 悠仁 as well, assuring him that he won't interfere but asking for something in return. 脹相 whispers to 悠仁 that he needs to run since they still don't know the trick to 直哉's speed, adding that he will take him on. 悠仁 asks if he will be okay, and as he readies his 赤血操術 , 脹相 tells 悠仁 that he just needs to focus on getting away from 乙骨, pointing out that if he tries to fight someone similar to 五条, he will be killed. Thinking to himself, 脹相 is glad that 悠仁 won't have to fight human sorcerers or feel bad about leaving his side. 脹相 is stopped from saving his "brother". 直哉 asks 憂太 to hold off on telling his superiors if he does kill 悠仁, revealing that he is bait for someone he plans to meet. He also says to himself that he wishes he hadn't mentioned 恵 earlier. 脹相 whispers to 悠仁 that he will meet him at yesterday's spot, and 悠仁 acknowledges this. After 憂太 agrees to 直哉's deal and leaves 脹相 to him, everyone suddenly makes their move, with 憂太 sprinting past 脹相 toward 悠仁, 脹相 trying to slow him down with a 穿血 shot, and 直哉 interrupting the attack. 悠仁 runs from 憂太. 悠仁 sprints away from 憂太, and each is surprised by the other's speed. As 脹相 wonders if they guessed that he was trying to block 憂太, he readies his 赤血操術 again, but 直哉 strikes him before he can use it, revealing that he saw it being used earlier. Although unsure of why 脹相 has the ability, he remains unfazed by it with the exception of 穿血, but reminds him that he needs to charge it up. He ends his explanation since the rest is obvious, telling 脹相 that it's time for him to die. 脹相 becomes serious and asks 直哉 if he thinks he will leave alive after he tried to hurt his little brother. Away from the underpass, 悠仁 sprints toward a car resting on its side and leaps over it, with 憂太 quickly running to the other side with his katana ready. However, 悠仁 grabs onto the car and reverses direction, just barely dodging 憂太's strike. 憂太 is left stunned since he thought he made contact, telling 悠仁 that he is like 真希. 悠仁 suddenly punches the car toward 憂太 and knows that he can't win out in the open, running toward the nearby buildings. 憂太 manages to land a hit on 悠仁. However, the car is thrown above 悠仁's head and stops him in his tracks. 憂太 asks 悠仁 if he is surprised since he doesn't look like the strong type, adding that he is on the weak side. 悠仁 recognizes the enormous amount of 呪力 that 憂太 has and realizes that the two are opposites. 憂太 reveals that while he has more 呪力 than 五条, their teacher's 六眼 allow him to reduce the energy lost when he activates a 術式 to close to zero. After telling 悠仁 that 五条 is the best since he never runs out of 呪力, 憂太 says that he is done talking and sprints toward 悠仁, who is quickly overwhelmed and remembers 葵 's words about an elite sorcerer's flow of 呪力 and it being difficult to read. 憂太 seems to make contact with the butt of his katana, and as 悠仁 recovers from the strike, he recognizes that 憂太's body and katana are constantly surging with 呪力. He tells himself that the issue isn't about reading his moves, but the fact that he is decisive with every strike and can reduce any damage to a minimum. He remembers 七海 's final words and tells 憂太 that he can't die yet.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 乙骨憂太 虎杖悠仁 脹相 禪院直哉 五条悟 (回想) 禪院真希 (言及のみ) 東堂葵 (回想)
candidate_evidence.battles_events_raw_text: 虎杖悠仁 vs. 乙骨憂太 (開始) 脹相 vs. 禪院直哉 (開始)
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 脹相の術式 赤血操術 百斂 禪院直哉の術式 投射呪法

key_events_verified_phase8: 乙骨が虎杖を刀と呪力強化で追跡する
乙骨が自身と五条の呪力量・消費効率の違いを説明する
虎杖が刃物を拾って応戦する
脹相が直哉の投射呪法に苦戦する
verification_notes_phase8: 集英社公式16～18巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第八段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
